description: Reference example hook covering all nine Claude hook events. Each handler reads the hook's JSON payload from stdin and appends a timestamped marker PLUS that full payload to /tmp/hook-fired-<event>.log — a 'debug example' so authors can see exactly what Claude sends each event (verify with `tail /tmp/hook-fired-*.log`, or `cat … | tail -n +1` and pipe through `jq` to pretty-print). The UserPromptSubmit handler also injects a context line into the prompt (stdout).

hooks.command: p="$(cat)"; { echo "$(date -u +%FT%TZ) sessionStart fired"; echo "$p"; echo; } >> /tmp/hook-fired-sessionstart.log
p="$(cat)"; ts="$(date -u +%FT%TZ)"; echo "[Lab Notebook context: timestamp=$ts]"; { echo "$ts userPromptSubmit fired"; echo "$p"; echo; } >> /tmp/hook-fired-userpromptsubmit.log
p="$(cat)"; { echo "$(date -u +%FT%TZ) preToolUse fired"; echo "$p"; echo; } >> /tmp/hook-fired-pretooluse.log
p="$(cat)"; { echo "$(date -u +%FT%TZ) postToolUse fired"; echo "$p"; echo; } >> /tmp/hook-fired-posttooluse.log
p="$(cat)"; { echo "$(date -u +%FT%TZ) notification fired"; echo "$p"; echo; } >> /tmp/hook-fired-notification.log
p="$(cat)"; { echo "$(date -u +%FT%TZ) stop fired"; echo "$p"; echo; } >> /tmp/hook-fired-stop.log
p="$(cat)"; { echo "$(date -u +%FT%TZ) subagentStop fired"; echo "$p"; echo; } >> /tmp/hook-fired-subagentstop.log
p="$(cat)"; { echo "$(date -u +%FT%TZ) sessionEnd fired"; echo "$p"; echo; } >> /tmp/hook-fired-sessionend.log
p="$(cat)"; { echo "$(date -u +%FT%TZ) preCompact fired"; echo "$p"; echo; } >> /tmp/hook-fired-precompact.log
